description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow to package mc_rtc. The workflow should trigger on repository dispatches with types package-master or package-release, on push to tags matching v*, and on pull requests to any branch. For tags, check version coherency in CMakeLists.txt and debian/changelog, create a release, and build and upload packages to Cloudsmith. For non-tag pushes and pull requests, build packages and upload them to Cloudsmith if the target is master.
